untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for Eve & Adam Double Bottoms (EADB) requires identification of two distinct bottom formations with the right bottom higher than the left bottom, plus detection of resistance level between them. This geometric/structural pattern detection cannot be expressed using only the allowed price, moving average, oscillator, and volatility indicators. The pattern requires multi-bar candlestick shape analysis and relative price level comparisons across non-adjacent bars that exceed the scope of simple indicator thresholds.
translation_notes: Entry attempted as breakout above pivot (resistance), but true pattern detection requires custom pattern recognition not available in allowed indicators. Exit set to close below SMA_20 as a reasonable reversal signal. Success rates noted: 78% in bull markets, 66% meet price target in bull markets vs 47% in bear markets. Volume characteristics noted: patterns without breakout gaps and narrow patterns perform better.
